price: die, wenn sie sich von den Menschen zumessen lassen, sich volles Maß geben lassen,
arabic: ٱلَّذِينَ إِذَا ٱكۡتَالُواْ عَلَى ٱلنَّاسِ يَسۡتَوۡفُونَ

version.title: German Translation - Bubenheim
version.description: Translation of the Quran meanings into German by Abdullah As-Samit (Frank Bubenheim) and Dr. Nadeem Elyas

meta.transliteration: alladhīna idhā ik'tālū ʿalā al-nāsi yastawfūna
